title: Maxiti
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Maxiti''' or '''Murk''' as he was called by some [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]] gang members, was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[Pembric Security Legionnaires]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. During [[Talon Karrde]]'s visit to the [[Kathol Republic]], he was stopped by Maxiti who kept him from aiding [[Shada D'ukal]] in defeating a group of swoop bike gang members. After the gang was defeated by D'ukal, Maxiti took her and Karrde to talk with [[Crev Bombaasa/Legends|Crev Bombaasa]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
